op.text: [2025-07-19] The Dorothy Jean sailed on July 12, 2025, exactly as planned — gentle afternoon on the Columbia with Sam working the lines, Marcus and Nina aboard. There's a photo of Nina asleep in a tiny life jacket against Marcus's chest with the mainsail up behind them. Dana said: 'I have already had it printed twice.' The sky was 'high thin stuff, not quite a mare's tail but close,' and Dana decided that counted as a blessing.

[as of 2025-07-19] Interoperability platform shipped in early July 2025 after eighteen months of development and internal politics; CEO gave Dana a shout-out by name in the all-hands; described as 'the biggest professional moment of my life'

Has historically defined herself through work ambition and achievement; described herself as 'the person who is her work' for fifteen years, 'not in a grim way — I mean it like an engine'; said 'ambition's been my whole spine' and 'that's how I've always known I'm okay'; as of 2025-07-19, experiencing unexpected emotional flatness at major professional wins, which she attributes to grief
